en_body:
golden beaks nibble, holding fragrant flowers
little birds frolic, beating wings, learning to fly
the green meadow overflows with fresh flower-colors
brilliant gold among deep rose mingling indigo
sun drunk with wine, wind intoxicates cloud-wings across heaven's road
Spring seeps into the skin of Resurrection
note: “Resurrection” braids the Christian Easter season into the bodily renewal of Spring.
